/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Werror -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_hello.c.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_assignment_validate.c.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_hello_Runner.c.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/assignment1/Test_assignment_validate_Runner.c.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/__/examples/autotest-validate/autotest-validate.c.o" "CMakeFiles/assignment-autotest.dir/test/unity_runner.c.o" -o assignment-autotest  Unity/src/libunity.a
